name: NA-Selank Amidate
subtitle: N-Acetyl Selank Amidate | Enhanced Anxiolytic Nootropic
overview: NA-Selank Amidate is an enhanced version of Selank, the anxiolytic nootropic peptide developed at Russia's Institute of Molecular Genetics. The N-acetyl group improves blood-brain barrier penetration and creates more stable metabolites, while the C-terminal amidation further enhances metabolic stability and receptor binding. Unlike benzodiazepines, it provides anxiety relief without sedation, dependency, or cognitive impairment.
mechanism: NA-Selank Amidate modulates multiple neurotransmitter systems including GABA, dopamine, and serotonin, while regulating brain-derived neurotrophic factor (BDNF). It allosterically modulates GABAA receptors without causing the sedation or dependency of benzodiazepines. The peptide activates serotonin metabolism in the hypothalamus and brainstem, and increases BDNF levels to promote neuronal growth and differentiation.
keyBenefits: Enhanced blood-brain barrier penetration (vs standard Selank)
Improved metabolic stability and longer half-life
Nootropic effects with enhanced memory and learning

items.name: Generalized Anxiety
items.description: Standard Selank approved in Russia for GAD; NA-Selank Amidate offers enhanced delivery.

items.name: Stress Response
items.description: Modulates stress response through GABA and serotonin systems without sedation.

items.name: Mood Enhancement
items.description: Improves mood through serotonin metabolism activation.

items.name: Memory Enhancement
items.description: Increases memory trace stability for up to 30 days in animal studies.

items.name: Learning
items.description: BDNF elevation supports learning and neuroplasticity.

items.name: Neuroprotection
items.description: BDNF increase reduces effects of neurological injury.

items.name: Immune Modulation
items.description: Based on tuftsin structure, retains immunomodulatory properties.

deliveryMethods.overview: Intranasal spray is the preferred delivery method, providing direct access to the brain while bypassing first-pass metabolism. The N-acetyl and amide modifications enhance absorption and stability.
Subcutaneous injection is an alternative to intranasal delivery, though nasal spray is generally preferred for this peptide.

steps: Clean work area and hands thoroughly

interactions.notes: Often combined for comprehensive cognitive enhancement and mood support.
Enhanced versions combine well for cognitive and anxiolytic effects.
Different nootropic mechanisms; can be combined.

timeline.effects: Anxiolytic effects begin; reduced stress response
Benefits persist for approximately 1 week after 14-day course

contraindications: Known hypersensitivity to Selank or tuftsin
monitoring: Limit cycles to 2-3 weeks to prevent potential GABAergic desensitization

references.title: Selank Administration Affects Expression of Genes in GABAergic Neurotransmission
references.keyFindings: Selank modulates GABAA receptor activity, contributing to anxiolytic effects without benzodiazepine-like side effects.

references.title: Selank Clinical Trial in Anxiety Disorders
references.keyFindings: 14 days of intranasal Selank produced pronounced anxiolytic and mild nootropic effects; benefits persisted 1 week post-treatment.

references.title: Selank and Serotonin Metabolism
references.journal: Bulletin of Experimental Biology and Medicine
references.keyFindings: Single Selank injection activated serotonin metabolism and increased memory trace stability for up to 30 days.

references.title: Selank and BDNF Expression
references.keyFindings: Selank administration increases BDNF levels, supporting neuronal growth and memory enhancement.
